quotes: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern

Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern (per patient brochure, which is the **reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials**).

intent: Establish the reference content block structure derived from the patient brochure.
rule_text: The canonical content block pattern is: bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote (per the patient brochure, which is the reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials).
scope_note: Applies as reference template for visuals, messaging, and tone across ALL Lisraya materials, not layout alone.
